skill.name: unified-entity
skill.author: jamespacileo
skill.description: Comprehensive entity skill for breathe-together-v2. Create new entities, improve existing ones, debug issues, and systematically review all entities. Covers ECS Architecture, Triplex Integration, Performance Tuning, and Debug Tools. Includes 3 entity archetypes (Visual-Only, Simple ECS, Complex ECS), 4 guided workflows, prompt-to-update learning system, and real-world templates from the codebase.
